SEARCH
Package clientLogic

Class OrderLogic

java.lang.Object
clientLogic.OrderLogic
public class OrderLogic extends Object
Logic class for handling Order-related requests. Constructs requests for creating, updating, deleting, and retrieving orders.

    Method
    Description
    void
    checkAvailability(Order order)
    Checks if a specific table/time is available for the order.
    void
    createOrder(Object data)
    Creates a new order.
    void
    deleteOrder(int orderId)
    Deletes an order (cancels it).

    getAllOrders()
    Requests all orders from the server.
    void
    getAvailabilityOptions(Order order)
    Requests available times for a given order context.
    void
    getConfirmationCodeByContact(String contact)
    Resends confirmation code by contact info.
    void
    getOrderByConfirmationCode(int code, int currentSubscriberCode)
    Retrieves an order by its confirmation code.
    void
    getOrderById(int orderId)
    Requests a specific order by its ID.
    void
    getOrdersBySubscriberId(int subscriberId)
    Requests all orders for a specific subscriber.
    void
    getSubscriberHistory(int subscriberId)
    Gets order history for a subscriber.
    void
    getSubscriberOrders(int subscriberCode)
    Gets subscriber's orders (likely similar to getOrdersBySubscriberId but using code).
    void
    sendEmail(Order order)
    Requests to send an email for the order.
    void
    updateOrder(Order order)
    Updates an existing order.
    void
    updateOrderCheckOut(Order order)
    Updates the checkout time/status of an order.

  • Method Details

    • getConfirmationCodeByContact

      public void getConfirmationCodeByContact(String contact)
      Resends confirmation code by contact info.
      Parameters:
      contact - The contact information (email/phone)

    • getAllOrders

      public void getAllOrders()
      Requests all orders from the server.

    • getOrderById

      public void getOrderById(int orderId)
      Requests a specific order by its ID.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the order

    • getOrdersBySubscriberId

      public void getOrdersBySubscriberId(int subscriberId)
      Requests all orders for a specific subscriber.
      Parameters:
      subscriberId - The subscriber's ID

    • getSubscriberOrders

      public void getSubscriberOrders(int subscriberCode)
      Gets subscriber's orders (likely similar to getOrdersBySubscriberId but using code).
      Parameters:
      subscriberCode - The subscriber code

    • getAvailabilityOptions

      public void getAvailabilityOptions(Order order)
      Requests available times for a given order context.
      Parameters:
      order - The order with date/time details

    • createOrder

      public void createOrder(Object data)
      Creates a new order.
      Parameters:
      data - The order data

    • checkAvailability

      public void checkAvailability(Order order)
      Checks if a specific table/time is available for the order.
      Parameters:
      order - The order details to check

    • updateOrder

      public void updateOrder(Order order)
      Updates an existing order.
      Parameters:
      order - The updated order object

    • updateOrderCheckOut

      public void updateOrderCheckOut(Order order)
      Updates the checkout time/status of an order.
      Parameters:
      order - The order to check out

    • deleteOrder

      public void deleteOrder(int orderId)
      Deletes an order (cancels it).
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the order to delete

    • getSubscriberHistory

      public void getSubscriberHistory(int subscriberId)
      Gets order history for a subscriber.
      Parameters:
      subscriberId - The subscriber ID

    • sendEmail

      public void sendEmail(Order order)
      Requests to send an email for the order.
      Parameters:
      order - The order to send email for

    • getOrderByConfirmationCode

      public void getOrderByConfirmationCode(int code, int currentSubscriberCode)
      Retrieves an order by its confirmation code.
      Parameters:
      code - The confirmation code
      currentSubscriberCode - The subscriber code asking for it
